query:
SELECT id, clientName, scheduledDate, scheduledTime, status, workType, createdAt 
FROM appointments 
WHERE clientName LIKE '%Joan%' OR clientName LIKE '%Gutiérrez%' OR whatsappPhone LIKE '%3105241784%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
